subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God! Ascend thou from the realm of creation and enter into the sanctified and transcendent dominion of thy Lord, that the world and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز حق از عالم خلق صعود نما و بعالم تقدیس و تنزیه ربانی وارد شو تا دنیا و
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @love of God, @consolation and comfort, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut]
